quotes.text: 高考是普通人改变命运成本最低的方式，没有之一。
quotes.text_en: The gaokao is the lowest-cost way for ordinary people to change their fate — bar none.
quotes.context: 强调高考对于普通家庭的重要意义

quotes.text: 你看到的那些说学历不重要的人，他们自己全是名校毕业。
quotes.text_en: Those people you see saying degrees don't matter? They all graduated from elite schools themselves.
quotes.context: 讽刺「读书无用论」，揭示幸存者偏差

quotes.text: 社会的本质就是分层的。教育是你往上走的电梯，错过了就只能爬楼梯。
quotes.text_en: Society is fundamentally stratified. Education is your elevator up — miss it and you'll have to take the stairs.
quotes.context: 谈论教育与社会阶层流动的关系

quotes.text: 别跟我谈理想，先把饭吃饱再说。
quotes.text_en: Don't talk to me about ideals — feed yourself first.
quotes.context: 强调务实择业，先解决生存问题

quotes.text: 孩子不懂事不可怕，可怕的是家长也不懂事。
quotes.text_en: It's not scary when kids are naive — what's scary is when parents are too.
quotes.context: 批评部分家长在志愿填报中的盲目性

quotes.text: 你的人生不是只有一次高考，但高考确实是最公平的那一次。
quotes.text_en: Your life isn't just one gaokao, but the gaokao is indeed the fairest chance you'll get.
quotes.context: 强调高考制度的相对公平性

quotes.text: 阶层固化不是说说而已。你爸不是李刚，你就得比别人多努力十倍。
quotes.text_en: Social stratification isn't just talk. If your dad isn't powerful, you have to work ten times harder than others.
quotes.context: 谈论阶层固化对普通人的影响

quotes.text: 穷人和富人最大的差距不是钱，是信息差。人家知道的事你根本不知道。
quotes.text_en: The biggest gap between rich and poor isn't money — it's information asymmetry. They know things you don't even know exist.
quotes.context: 分析信息差对人生选择的影响

quotes.text: 你以为是你的努力让你成功了？不，是平台。换个平台，你什么都不是。
quotes.text_en: You think your effort made you successful? No, it's the platform. Change platforms, and you're nothing.
quotes.context: 强调平台和环境比个人努力更重要

quotes.text: 婚姻就是第二次投胎。你嫁错了人或者娶错了人，后半辈子比选错专业还惨。
quotes.text_en: Marriage is your second birth lottery. Marry the wrong person, and the rest of your life will be worse than choosing the wrong major.
quotes.context: 将婚姻选择与人生选择类比

quotes.text: 普通人输不起。你试错的成本，可能是你全家三年的积蓄。
quotes.text_en: Ordinary people can't afford to lose. The cost of your mistakes might be your entire family's savings for three years.
quotes.context: 提醒普通家庭做选择要谨慎

quotes.text: 龙生龙、凤生凤，这话虽然难听，但你看看周围就知道了。教育是打破代际传递唯一的机会。
quotes.text_en: Dragons beget dragons, phoenixes beget phoenixes — harsh but look around you. Education is the only chance to break intergenerational transmission.
quotes.context: 谈论代际传递和教育的破局作用

quotes.text: 人脉不是你认识谁，是你对谁有用。没有利用价值，谁也不会搭理你。
quotes.text_en: Connections aren't about who you know — they're about who finds you useful. Without value, nobody will bother with you.

quotes.text: 认清自己很重要。你不是天才，大部分人都不是。接受平凡，然后在平凡中找到最优解。
quotes.text_en: Knowing yourself is crucial. You're not a genius — most people aren't. Accept being ordinary, then find the optimal solution within ordinary.
quotes.context: 鼓励考生认清自身定位

quotes.text: 先苦后甜和先甜后苦，你选哪个？年轻的时候吃苦不叫苦，老了吃苦才叫苦。
quotes.text_en: Bitterness first then sweetness, or sweetness first then bitterness? Hardship when young isn't really hardship; hardship when old truly is.
quotes.context: 鼓励年轻人趁年轻奋斗

quotes.text: 北京的孩子考400分上的学校，河南的孩子要考600分。你跟我说公平？
quotes.text_en: A kid in Beijing gets into a school with 400 points that a kid in Henan needs 600 for. And you talk to me about fairness?
quotes.context: 揭示高考地区不平等现象

quotes.text: 18岁选错了路，你可能要用一辈子来纠正。这就是为什么高考志愿那么重要。
quotes.text_en: Choose the wrong path at 18, and you might spend your whole life correcting it. That's why college application choices are so important.
quotes.context: 强调高考志愿选择的深远影响

quotes.text: 这个社会不会因为你善良就对你好。你得有本事，善良才有意义。
quotes.text_en: Society won't treat you well just because you're kind. You need to be capable first — only then does kindness matter.
quotes.context: 强调能力比品德更现实
